music.prompt: Glossy K-pop girl group house-pop single for fictional five-member group LUMINA, 124 BPM, pearl pink and chrome stage mood, pulsing four-on-the-floor drums, glassy synth bass, tight clap stack, confident female group vocals, soft pre-chorus lift, chantable hook, short rap tag, polished but not aggressive, global pop mix, 65 seconds.
music.lyrics:
[Intro: Rae]
Back door, heartbeat, mirror light
Chrome on my sleeve like a satellite
One breath, then the whole room shines
LUMINA stepping through the line

[Verse: Yumi, Sena]
I was quiet in the hallway glow
Counting every second till the speakers blow
Sena sings it soft, let the color rise
Pink flash blooming in my eyes

[Pre-Hook: Sena]
If the night gets loud, I get clearer
See the future in the vanity mirror
Hands up, no fear, we ignite
Tell the whole room, switch the light

[Hook: All]
Switchlight, switchlight
Turn me on when the beat hits right
Switchlight, switchlight
Pearl pink flash in the chrome moonlight
Step, pose, shine, don't blink
We make the dark room glow in sync
Switchlight, switchlight
LUMINA lives when the lights go bright

[Rap Tag: Jia, Nari]
Click, click, camera, catch my angle
New code running through my ankle
Nari on the count, Jia on the flame
Say our name and the whole wall changes

[Final Hook: All]
Switchlight, switchlight
Turn me on when the beat hits right
Switchlight, switchlight
Pearl pink flash in the chrome moonlight
One more pose, one more shine
LUMINA crossing every line
Switchlight, switchlight
Meet us where the lights go bright
music.rationale: Switchlight is LUMINA's first broader pop single: a 65-second chrome house-pop track with a clear 15-second title hook for later Seedance video work.
